_comment: Bundled fallback registry index for the Synapse marketplace (ADR-0001). Used by GET /api/v1/marketplace when no SYNAPSE_TOOL_REGISTRY_URL env var is set. The real first-party index will live at https://synapse.whatif.dev/tools/index.json once the marketplace ships.

tools.name: Cloudtap
tools.description: Multi-tunnel Cloudflare quick tunnels. Auto-labels by registered project port.

tools.name: Open Synapse docs
tools.description: Opens the Synapse documentation in your default browser. A 12-line manifest — nothing else.

tools.name: Git status
tools.description: Runs `git status` in a chosen folder and shows the output. Demonstrates the process.spawn primitive.
